name: George Kirby
abstract: George Kirby (June 8, 1923 – September 30, 1995) was an American comedian, singer, and actor.

about_quotes.speaker: Bill Coleman
about_quotes.evidence: I had met George Kirby in the Philippines the same time as Thad Jones because he was in the same army with Thad and Stanley Facey

about_quotes.speaker: John Malachi
about_quotes.evidence: George Kirby is listed as a performer on shows/tours that the interviewee was part of (e.g., 'The Biggest Show of 1952', 'Paramount Theatre'), but no direct personal interaction or specific professional relationship with Kirby is described.

about_quotes.speaker: Big Chielf Moore
about_quotes.evidence: Another guy hollers at me at the airport, comedian, George Kirby. They used to all holler at me at the airport.

about_quotes.speaker: Budd Johnson
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] : Charlie Carpenter is now manager for George Kirby. >> [INTERVIEWEE] George Kirby, that's right.

about_quotes.speaker: John W. Bubbles
about_quotes.evidence: George Kirby, it happened to him. I had to tell him to leave the white woman and he might get some work.

about_quotes.speaker: Sonny Greer
about_quotes.evidence: And George Kirby was a busboy there. That's where I first heard him.
